title: CUB Digital Evolution
subtitle: Reimagining CUB's mobile banking for India's next-gen financial needs.
problem_statement: CUB's current mobile app offers standard features, lacking zero-to-one innovation and deep personalization for evolving Indian user needs.

pillars.title: Financial Anxiety
pillars.insight: Users worry about managing money and future security.

pillars.title: Digital Convenience
pillars.insight: Users expect seamless, instant transactions on mobile.

pillars.title: Trust & Security
pillars.insight: Users need assurance their finances are safe.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: HMW create hyper-personalized financial experiences for CUB users?
HMW empower users with proactive financial guidance?
HMW integrate community and gamification into banking?

data.name: HDFC Bank
cons: App can feel cluttered, less innovative.

data.name: ICICI Bank
cons: Overwhelming for new users, complex navigation.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need smart tools to grow my savings.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy, seeks efficient ways to manage finances and invest for future goals.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Managing business and personal finances is tough.
personas.bio: Busy entrepreneur, needs clear overview of cash flow and quick payment solutions.

insights: "I need to save more for future."

points.action: Replace generic promotions with personalized financial insights.
Integrate budgeting tools with spending categories and alerts.
Adapt social media features for financial goal sharing and support.
Modify 'Daily Expense' to offer predictive spending analysis.

pivot.before: Users manually track expenses and seek external financial advice.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from reactive transaction display to proactive, intelligent financial guidance and goal setting.
pivot.after: CUB becomes an AI-powered financial coach, guiding users towards wealth.

annotations.title: Smart Budgeting
annotations.rationale: Automated categorization and spending limits for 'Daily Expense'.

annotations.title: Goal Tracker
annotations.rationale: Visual progress bar for savings goals, linked to 'My Deposits'.

annotations.title: Financial Feed
annotations.rationale: Personalized articles and tips based on user transactions and 'My Wealth'.

data.finding: Balance hidden by default (XXXXX) reduces immediate visibility.
UI elements are generally consistent across screens.
No clear error prevention for fund transfer input visible.
Limited customization options for dashboard layout.
